storyInfo: Enciodes climbs aboard the Gloriana alone to represent Kjerag in negotiations with the Duke of Caster. Enya and her retinue see a giant Kjeragandr statue and frozen Saintesses in the hidden cavern, before everyone is pulled into an illusion.

attributes.content: The rock wall collapses with the first blast, revealing a deep cavern to the spelunkers.
Just like I thought. Looks like you really can go deeper.
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: Can't see much further than the tunnel entrance... We'll need to go down if we want to explore.
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: Enya?
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: Her question echoes through the cave. The Saintess does not answer, for she is watching the babbling old man purse his lips tight.
'Seek not my temple, but my heart.'
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: ...I await you, Elder Adso.
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: His legs are like wizened tree roots, his dried-out throat like a shallow pool in the dry season.
There he stands, unmoving.
...I shall stay here and keep watch, while you enter to do what you must do.
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: But didn't you make a vow with Enya that you'd prove whatever's inside isn't Kjeragandr?
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: If you don't come with us—
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: I have already made myself clear. I shall keep watch outside.
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: If She truly does exist, then She should come out Herself to greet me.
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: Elder...
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: It seems as though, rather than learning the truth, you would much rather be blind to evidence of Her.
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: ...I... no, I would not... I would never...
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: There are no answers here...
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: Then why did you bring us here, yet refuse to bear witness?
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: No, She does not exist.
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: Daughter of Silverash, and you, and you too, do not pretend you have not seen.
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: The hunters who tan furs with frozen fingers, the gleaners who choke upon dust, and the Oripathy-haunted with their torn skin.
attributes.name: Adso
Adso
attributes.content: Have you not seen them, they who kneel upon the dirt until their knees bleed, all to beg and plead to Kjeragandr for salvation...

attributes.name: Adso
attributes.content: No, to end their miserable lives early, even...
While you huddled together in your warm houses making merry, it was I, and the Vine-Bead Court, who would go where you were unwilling to even look at, to the homes of the impoverished and destitute.
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: It was I who soothed them, I who kept preaching to them that 'none shall be abandoned'... 'Even if you were born into a lifetime of suffering, there is still a god who loves you'...
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: It was we who built the nation where people can greet their ends with a smile, but you, but Kjeragandr—
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: This arbitrary liege lord, this king who sees all as Her cattle! She can, should, save these people, save all of Kjerag.
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: Yet She is aloof, magicking up some 'miracle' every once in a while to show her power...
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: Why is it only ever barely a handful of people saved?!
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: Now, you even wish to go see this monster, this tyrant, to ask Her to deny me, to deny the order we have so painstakingly built.
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: I... I cannot—
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: What more is left that could support this old man? He collapses into the dirt, crying out in anguish, as if his frail body were struck by some invisible hammer.
...Speak, tell me.
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: Why does She not know? Why does She not understand?
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: Why do you stay silent...?
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: Um...
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: Great Elder... Why is he so upset?
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: Elder Adso... I understand where you are coming from.
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: We are not allowed to witness the true face of God. Only through Her admonishments, Her creations can we describe Her.
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: But I still wish to believe...
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: That no matter what I see at the other end of this cave, my faith shall not be swayed. The virtues and commandments, the knowledge and wisdom She has conferred upon us. They have meaning.
attributes.name: Enya
Enya
attributes.content: I merely wish to see clearly...

attributes.name: Enya
attributes.content: what road the children of Kjerag have followed.
Enya turns and walks into the deep cavern without the slightest hesitation, towards where her faith lies.
<p=2>Deck of the Gloriana</>
attributes.name: group_location_stamp

attributes.content: ...How long has it been now?
attributes.name: Duke of Caster

attributes.content: It has been five hours and fifty-seven minutes since we sent our ultimatum, Your Grace.
attributes.name: Caster's Guard

attributes.content: Hmm...
attributes.name: Duke of Caster

attributes.content: I must say, I did not expect Enciodes to choose to respond this way.
attributes.name: Duke of Caster

attributes.content: 'Tis a pity things had to end like this.
attributes.name: Duke of Caster

attributes.content: Relay the order, all men are to—
attributes.name: Duke of Caster

attributes.content: That...
attributes.name: Duke of Caster

attributes.content: Your Grace! We've sighted one of Kjerag's high-speed battleships!
attributes.name: Caster's Guard

attributes.content: You don't mean... How many?
attributes.name: Duke of Caster

attributes.content: Just... the one, Your Grace.
attributes.name: Caster's Guard

attributes.content: Even without the aid of binoculars, those standing atop the deck can see it.
In the distance, a battleship slowly emerges from a snow-draped valley, its hue that of silver ash.
Perhaps everyone is thinking the same thing at this moment: This ship, no matter if you compare it to the fleet it is facing, or the mountains behind it, is rather on the small side...
Silverash...?
attributes.name: Duke of Caster

attributes.content: Your Grace, the ship is hailing us on a public frequency.
attributes.name: Caster's Guard

attributes.content: Their message states that this is Kjerag's high-speed battleship, and her captain is Enciodes Silverash.
attributes.name: Caster's Guard

attributes.content: He sends his greetings to the Victorian Duke of Caster...
attributes.name: Caster's Guard

attributes.content: But does this stunt of his mean he is here to negotiate, or to start a war?
attributes.name: Duke of Caster

attributes.content: He says he hopes he can have a pleasant discussion with Your Grace... and he hopes that discussion can take place aboard Your Grace's Gloriana.
attributes.name: Caster's Guard

attributes.content: ...Very well.
attributes.name: Duke of Caster

attributes.content: Welcome our guest aboard.
attributes.name: Duke of Caster

attributes.content: It has been a while, Most Esteemed Duke of Caster.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: I trust you have been well, Enciodes... It truly has been quite a while.
attributes.name: Duke of Caster

attributes.content: Whenever a youth such as you stands before me, it reminds me that time is fleeting. Oh, how is one meant to endure such a thing?
attributes.name: Duke of Caster

attributes.content: Though much time has passed, I shall never dare forget the aid you gave me at the time, alongside your kindness towards Karlan Trade.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: Haha... You were far too hasty when leaving Victoria. You only remembered to bring along Caster's aid with you, while leaving our friendship behind.
attributes.name: Duke of Caster

attributes.content: I had even hoped that, one day, you would invite me to Kjerag as your guest.
attributes.name: Duke of Caster

attributes.content: But since you are here, then I should extend you a host's courtesy.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: 'A host's courtesy', you say?
attributes.name: Duke of Caster

attributes.content: I find myself rather curious. Since you have been expelled from Karlan Trade, and the Silverash clan is branded as traitors in bed with Victoria...
attributes.name: Duke of Caster

attributes.content: Then who have you come to me as?
attributes.name: Duke of Caster

attributes.content: It is simple.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: I am here as the sole authority of Kjerag.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: I shall speak for this nation as we discuss matters.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: By Kjeragandr, this place is huge...
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: It's beyond imagination... Was this place really an artificial refuge?
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: At the very least, it was hidden by human hands.
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: Do you see any ruins the Court may have hidden here, Enya?
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: No, I don't—
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: Wait, did you hear that?
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: The sound like rocks falling onto snow?
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: No, it's more like... Based on these readings, it's rhythmic, like...
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: ...A heartbeat.
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: Even this stone here...
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: These veins on it are like actual blood vessels, fluorescing to the pulse of the sound...
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: How would you explain it?
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: ...My instruments are picking up biosignals.
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: It's going to be hard to believe, but there's only one answer.
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: We are inside the body of a living being.
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: ...But how can that be?
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: Whoa!
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: What is this? Nearly tripped over it.
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: Seems like there's some sort of statue here, I nearly bumped into it too...
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: Let me turn my emergency light on.
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: The shimmering light dispels the darkness, revealing the thing that is blocking their path.
Huh? An ice sculpture? Why's it crawling across the ground?
attributes.name: Joanna
Elena
attributes.content: It's not the only one.

attributes.name: Elena
attributes.content: Look, there's another one there... Hmm, seems like there's even more of them this way...
They're clothed the same way the ancient peoples of Kjerag are described in historical records, but did those people have the technique to sculpt like this?
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: Craft and sculpture of the time were cruder. Enya, what do you....?
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: Enya?
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: I am afraid that these are not statues.
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: They're not?
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: They are... past Saintesses.
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: They are from the last time Kjeragandr vanished. They who offered themselves up as sacrifices to beg Her to return to Kjerag.
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: Enya brushes her fingers against a 'sculpture's' face. Her wrinkles. Her flesh. Her cheeks puffed up by gritted teeth. Her eyelashes. Her tears staining her cheeks, unevaporated.
A girl dead from hypothermia, her delusional relief and trembling from the cold merged into a single expression.
They were encased in ice after their deaths, preserving their faces and postures. They were... all looking in the same direction.
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: They were all looking for Her... answer.
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: The women follow the gazes of the 'sculptures', turning to look behind them.
...What is that? I've never seen anything shaped like that in Kjerag...
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: It is Kjeragandr.
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: It is what the people of the past saw... and also—
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: Its height and scale are far beyond ancient techniques. It couldn't possibly be a relic of the past...
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: But this cave has been sealed off for ages. Who did this, and why...?
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: A frigid wind from nowhere, laden with fine snow, slams into them.
Enya, look out!
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: The statue is... calling me.
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: The sound of a beating heart gradually becomes an ear-splitting din. She cannot hear the shouts of her companions, not even her own breathing.
The only thing her senses take in is the statue's icy radiance, alongside an irresistible urge—
The moment the Saintess's hand strokes the base of the statue, a great shock envelops all present. A vibrant scene rushes into the Saintess's mind...
...Gah, where'd it go hiding now?
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: I just saw it—its shadow darted through the grass and vanished. Did I lose track of it again?
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: Past experience advises her to stoop down. She was still a child the first time she set foot into the forest. What was it her father taught her then?

attributes.text: 'Hunting isn't easy. You need to be careful, you need to be brave, you need to be determined, and you need to be merciful.'
'You need to pay attention to the tracks left by every animal.'
'Footprints in the snow, scratches on bark, fallen hairs, spoor and traces of buried food...'

attributes.content: She walks by an expanse of snow, trees and bare soil. Still no sign of her prey.
Her gigantic prey, nearly the size of a small mountain, seems to have disappeared into thin air.
'Don't rush, even if you can't find anything. Don't rush... Joanna.'
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: 'You're a hunter. You'll find your game.'
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: 'For She has promised you that you may enter the forest with bow and crossbow, and the forest shall give you the meat and fat you require. You—'
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: I see it, over there!
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: The shadow fleeing out from the underbrush is swift, shooting out over the trail towards the depths of the forest on the other side.
The girl waves her arm behind her as she shouts.
Dad, head into the forest from the side, let's pincer it!
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: A voice replies from the empty forest.
Go, Joanna! You and me, we'll catch it!
attributes.name: Male Voice

attributes.text: 'You're such a faithful girl, never missing prayers or ceremonies, always concentrating when you carve statues of Her, even telling Her your thoughts every night.'
'She will grant you a full belly, happiness, and a tomorrow to wake up to. Because of your piety, and the time you have given Her.'

attributes.content: If... Hah, if I can actually hunt that thing down....
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: We won't have to go hungry this winter!
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: It'll be enough to feed my brothers and sisters, and I can even... I can even give some to the old lady next door, and the lady who just had a baby across the road...
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: The horns can be carved into figures of Kjeragandr, and the skin can be made into a new set of clothes for my sister.
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: There is a warmth in her chest to go with her joy, as if something were swelling within, fit to burst.
Her legs are faster than ever. Her hands do not tremble. She closes in on her prey.
Nearly... Nearly got it!
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: Please, bless my hand, Kjeragandr...
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: Her crossbow bolt flies through the air, its scream shattering the serenity of the snowfield.
The girl sprints after her quarry into a bush. She can almost reach its thick fur—
Ah...
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: There is nothing in her grasp.
Only a chunk of Originium crystal in her arm, growing like wildfire.
What use is your faith?
attributes.name: Savage Beast

attributes.content: Kjeragandr will not protect you. The land shall have its fill, and you are but its prey.
attributes.name: Savage Beast

attributes.content: This room is very familiar to me. Though I have never seen it, I am well aware of what this is.
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: The cramped, gloomy room is filled with the scent of pine oil, thick to the point you can barely walk through it. It is joined with a dry heat that resists description.
This is one of my thoughts.
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: The old man gets up from his chair. He steps forward, as if he were about to measure the size of the room with his feet.
One step, two steps, five steps, ten.
Ten steps. Ten is enough.
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: A narrow compartment. Soundproofed, insulated, unknown to others. Suited for clandestine discussions.
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: If I had put it that way, if I had extended the invitation that way, then the Silverashes...
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: What did I say when Luca came to meet with me?
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: Did I advise him to not commit this unpardonable sin, or did I not? Did I advise him to return to the righteous path, or did I not?
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: Did I agree with him, or did I not? Did I believe the new things that couple brought with them would destroy the soul of Kjerag, or did I not?
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: Did I tell him how to build a hidden room within the parlor of the Browntail manor, or did I not...?
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: ...Did I tell him how to store pine resin, flammable materials, dry wood and firestarters, or did I not?
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: The fragrance intensifies, to the point that it stings the nose.
You forgot our deal.
Brother...
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: You were supposed to take control of the Vine-Bead Court and work with me, so that all of Kjerag would serve under the Browntail name.
attributes.name: Luca Browntail

attributes.content: Why are you always such a do-nothing coward?!
attributes.name: Luca Browntail

attributes.content: No... It wasn't supposed to be like this...
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: You know how much blood is on our hands just getting us to this point.
attributes.name: Luca Browntail

attributes.content: Look at these two girls, Ratatos and Sciurus. They're your own flesh and blood.
attributes.name: Luca Browntail

attributes.content: You're not going to close your eyes as the Silverashes and Paleroches put them to the sword when they grow up, are you?
attributes.name: Luca Browntail

attributes.content: All my life, I have told many lies, cheated many people.
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: Including those I love, and those who love me. Those I trusted, and those who trusted me...
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: I once sincerely believed that great power was the answer to everything.
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: But I was wrong.
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: My decades in the Hall of Writings washed my heart clean of my arrogance and stupidity. I understood that the only thing left in my life was a mission.
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: A mission to serve the truth, the very virtue that Kjeragandr carved upon each and every one of our souls.
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: And so, to repent deeply...
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: For the injurious plots against my neighbors. For my despicable tearing away of parent from child. For my lust for power. For the lies that poured from my deceitful tongue.
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: If... If Kjeragandr truly existed, how could She ignore all I did?
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: Fire. A fire from out of nowhere.
Or rather, it is a fire lit decades ago. A well-crafted trap that has finally found its prey.
A fire that has burned for thousands of days finally sweeps in furiously, engulfing all that Adso sees.
...Get out of here. It was us who found this unfreezing lake first!
attributes.name: Ursus Clansman

attributes.content: Nonsense, we were the ones who found it first. Our brains and agility let us look out from atop the tallest branches, so we're the real masters of the lake!
attributes.name: Zalak Clanswoman

attributes.content: Sure, you've got good eyes, lets you spot water and fruit, but you've got weak limbs. You can barely do anything without wobbling like a baby.
attributes.name: Ursus Clansman

attributes.content: If it wasn't for our strong arms smashing those rocks to open up the mountain pass, nobody would be able to get here!
attributes.name: Ursus Clansman

attributes.content: And what about us?
attributes.name: Feline Clansman

attributes.content: It was us who crossed the streams, us who led the way for you, and us who guard the lake day in and day out. We're the ones who make sure parasites don't dirty the water, so we're the ones who should own the heart-lake!
attributes.name: Feline Clansman

attributes.content: Why must you fight among yourselves again...?
There is enough water here for all to drink, and enough forest for all to build homes.
My word... These fruits and crops... How are they growing out of nothing?
attributes.name: Zalak Clanswoman

attributes.content: Is this one of your miracles? We should make you our leader.
attributes.name: Ursus Clansman

attributes.content: From now on, we wish to hear your will, to follow your teachings.
attributes.name: Feline Clansman

attributes.content: It was all of you together who awakened me.
I have seen all the hardships you endured as you came here from every corner of the land... Your instincts tell you to slay one another, and your instincts tell you to aid one another.
But what can be achieved through strife can also be achieved through sharing and communication. It is already so difficult to survive upon this land. Must you add harming each other to the mix?
From here on, you need not regard each other as enemies. Enjoy what this land has to offer as equals.

attributes.text: It was the beginning of it all.
She appeared amidst the people, worked Her miracles, resolved their disputes.
The three clans began to live together. From then on, this land had a name.

attributes.content: Your Majesty... This book recording the history of Kjerag is complete. Pray, look over it the once.
attributes.name: Royal Minister

attributes.content: We do not dare forget a single line of Your teachings. We shall abide by Your every commandment.
attributes.name: Royal Minister

attributes.content: No... No need.
You must remember my words, and the road you have followed here, but most importantly, remember the first kindness you felt in your hearts.
You must reflect upon yourselves, see clear your own hearts, and make them clean. So long as you hold goodness within your hearts, you shall not walk down false paths.
I have nothing more to teach you. The road ahead is yours alone to walk.
I believe... It is time for me to rest.
Her Majesty has left...
attributes.name: Royal Minister

attributes.content: She told us to live as we have, but if there is nobody to command the Three Great Clans, how can we have faith in others?
attributes.name: Royal Minister

attributes.content: No... We must hurry back to our lands and warn our people. We must beware invasion from the other clans!
attributes.name: Royal Minister

attributes.text: Kjeragandr left, and as She did, She returned authority to Her people.
The wheel of history turned back to the beginning, and it seemed that the peaceful days of the past were but a fleeting dream...
Humanity returned to where it started.

attributes.content: What? I...?
attributes.name: Chosen Saintess

attributes.content: Indeed. You are the next Saintess. Please prepare your luggage.
attributes.name: Vine-Bead Court Cleric

attributes.content: My family still needs me. It's sowing season, after all. They won't be able to till the soil without me, and if that happens, they'll starve come winter.
attributes.name: Chosen Saintess

attributes.content: What about the lady from before? Where did she go after she came back from the mountains? Didn't you say that only she needed to climb?
attributes.name: Chosen Saintess

attributes.content: We need an answer, and need someone to bring that answer back to us. She was unable to fulfill her duty, and so the task falls to another.
attributes.name: Vine-Bead Court Cleric

attributes.content: It is a great duty. The weight of the lives of all Kjerag rests upon your shoulders. Please come with me, Saintess.
attributes.name: Vine-Bead Court Cleric

attributes.text: Rubbish! Complete nonsense! I can't believe you would lie to a little girl like that!
Don't listen to him! Go tell your family that you shouldn't throw your life away like that!

attributes.content: O watcher above the clouds, god of Kjerag, Kjeragandr...
attributes.name: Chosen Saintess

attributes.content: I ask... Hah... I ask that You, return to us...
attributes.name: Chosen Saintess

attributes.content: I beseech you... Respond to my voice...
attributes.name: Chosen Saintess

attributes.content: ...Cold... Mama... So cold...
attributes.name: Chosen Saintess

attributes.content: What must we do, Kjeragandr... Mmf...
attributes.name: Chosen Saintess

attributes.content: Seriously... I keep shivering so much... If the bells bother Kjeragandr, if She gets mad... What do I do...?
attributes.name: Chosen Saintess

attributes.content: No matter... No matter the wrongs we have done, I beg You, do not abandon us...
attributes.name: Chosen Saintess

attributes.content: O Great Kjeragandr...
attributes.name: Chosen Saintess

attributes.text: Don't come any further! You'll die!
Why... Why all this for a lie...?

attributes.content: Kjeragandr... has never—
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: So you saw.
attributes.name: Kjeragandr

attributes.content: You're...
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: Kjarr...?
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: Did you really only just figure it out?
attributes.name: Kjeragandr

attributes.content: Enya... You're more muddle-headed than I thought at times.
attributes.name: Kjeragandr
